title: CreateEventRequest
description: Request body for creating a custom event in FullStory

name.description: The name of the custom event

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the event occurred

id.description: The session identifier to associate the event with

use_most_recent.description: If true, the most recent session within 30 minutes will be used. If no recent session is found, the event is created without a session association.

user.description: User association for the event. Not accepted if session.id is provided since the session already identifies the user.

properties.description: Custom key-value properties for the event. Supports string, real, integer, boolean, array, and object types.

schema.description: Optional explicit type declarations for custom event properties
